vulnerability.title: Uninstall tuned Package
vulnerability.description: The tuned package can be removed with the following command: $ sudo dnf remove tuned
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # CAUTION: This remediation script will remove tuned # from the system, and may remove any packages # that depend on tuned. Execute this # remediation AFTER testing on a non-production # system! if rpm -q --quiet "tuned" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "tuned" fi
